title: Thermo UltiMate + Q Exactive: HILIC metabolomics LC-MS (LC gradient)
description: Thermo HILIC metabolomics gradient (0 to 100% B) on Atlantis HILIC, 300 uL/min, 10 mM ammonium formate eluents (Thermo app note 656).

payload.description: HILIC gradient for small-molecule / metabolite LC-MS on a Thermo UltiMate 3000, feeding a Q Exactive Orbitrap. This is a HILIC (hydrophilic interaction) method, not C18 reversed-phase: it retains polar metabolites. Solvent A is 10 mM ammonium formate in 95:5 acetonitrile/water with 0.1% formic acid; solvent B is 10 mM ammonium formate in 50:50 acetonitrile/water with 0.1% formic acid. Column: Waters Atlantis HILIC, 2.1 x 100 mm, 3 um, at 40 C. Flow 300 uL/min (0.300 mL/min), constant. Injection 5 uL. Gradient holds 0% B to 1 min, ramps to 100% B by 20 min, holds to 24.9 min, returns to 0% B at 25 min, re-equilibrate to 30 min. Pair with the matching MS setup template. Source: Thermo Fisher Application Note 656, https://assets.thermofisher.com/TFS-Assets/CMD/Application-Notes/AN-656-LC-MSn-Metabolomics-AN64832-EN.pdf . Representative starting-point method, verify against the source and tune per instrument and sample.

ingredients.name: 10 mM ammonium formate in 95:5 acetonitrile/water + 0.1% formic acid
10 mM ammonium formate in 50:50 acetonitrile/water + 0.1% formic acid
